TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Saisiyat, story: SaiNr-frog7_kalaeh a taro_
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.PHON: ʔæhœʔ kitaʔ ka takəm raj katis~θraloman.
ʔæhœʔ kitaʔ ka takəm raj katis~θraloman.
S.TRANSL: 狗看著瓶子裡的青蛙.
The dog was looking at a frog inside a container.

S.PHON: mæʔijæh ʔæhæʔ raj laŋi.
mæʔijæh ʔæhæʔ raj laŋi.
S.TRANSL: 一個人在旁邊.

TRANSL.notes: There was a boy beside (the dog).

S.TRANSL: There was a boy beside .

S.FORM: ma tingoo' a kita' ka takem.
S.PHON: ma tiŋooʔ a kitaʔ ka takəm.
S.FORM: ma tingoo' a kita' ka takem.
S.PHON: ma tiŋooʔ a kitaʔ ka takəm.
S.TRANSL: 往下看著青蛙.
The boy looked downward at the frog.

S.PHON: raj βaβaw hajz~ða ka ʔilaʃ.
raj βaβaw hajz~ða ka ʔilaʃ.
S.TRANSL: 上面有月亮.
There was a moon above.

S.PHON: hiz~ða laŋi hajz~ða ka halapaw.
hiz~ða laŋi hajz~ða ka halapaw.
S.TRANSL: 那邊有床.
There was a bed on the side."

S.FORM: hayza' ka halapaw langi ka kaybaeen.
S.PHON: hajz~ðaʔ ka halapaw laŋi ka kajβæən.
S.FORM: hayza' ka halapaw langi ka kaybaeen.
S.PHON: hajz~ðaʔ ka halapaw laŋi ka kajβæən.
S.TRANSL: 床邊有衣服.
There were clothes beside the bed.

S.PHON: takəm raj katis~θraloman kas~θʔœhaz~ð ila.
takəm raj katis~θraloman kas~θʔœhaz~ð ila.
S.TRANSL: 瓶子裡的青蛙跑出來了.
The frog came out of the container.

S.PHON: hajz~ðaʔ ka hæhœwaj.
hajz~ðaʔ ka hæhœwaj.
S.TRANSL: 有鞋子.
There were shoes.

S.PHON: mæʔijæh raj halapaw minaʔrəm.
mæʔijæh raj halapaw minaʔrəm.
S.TRANSL: 人在床上睡覺.
The boy was asleep on his bed.

S.PHON: kajβæən ʔaʃkan raj raiʔ.
kajβæən ʔaʃkan raj raiʔ.
S.TRANSL: 衣服放在地上.
His clothes were on the floor.

S.PHON: raj raiʔ ila ka hæhœwaj.
raj raiʔ ila ka hæhœwaj.
S.TRANSL: 鞋子放在地上.
His shoes were on the floor.

S.PHON: raj katis~θraloman takəm raiw ila.
raj katis~θraloman takəm raiw ila.
S.TRANSL: 瓶子裡的青蛙跑掉了.
The frog inside the container went away.

S.FORM: mae'iyaeh ki 'aehoe' m'itol sanabih 'oka' ila ka takem.
S.PHON: mæʔijæh ki ʔæhœʔ mʔitol s~θanaβih ʔokaʔ ila ka takəm.
S.FORM: mae'iyaeh ki 'aehoe' m'itol sanabih 'oka' ila ka takem.
S.PHON: mæʔijæh ki ʔæhœʔ mʔitol s~θanaβih ʔokaʔ ila ka takəm.
S.TRANSL: 人和狗起床,四處看,青蛙不見了.
When the person and his dog got up, they looked around and the frog was not there."

S.FORM: o e mae'iyaeh m'itol mari' ka haehoeway sisilin babaw.
S.PHON: o ə mæʔijæh mʔitol mariʔ ka hæhœwaj s~θis~θilin βaβaw.
S.FORM: o e mae'iyaeh m'itol mari' ka haehoeway sisilin babaw.
S.PHON: o ə mæʔijæh mʔitol mariʔ ka hæhœwaj s~θis~θilin βaβaw.
S.TRANSL: 人起床拿了鞋子提起來.
The boy got up and took his shoes and lifted them up.

S.FORM: 'aehoe' 'ima payhoe' ray katisraloman 'am alibih ka ta'oeloeh.
S.PHON: ʔæhœʔ ʔima pajhœʔ raj katis~θraloman ʔam aliβih ka taʔœlœh.
S.FORM: 'aehoe' 'ima payhoe' ray katisraloman 'am alibih ka ta'oeloeh.
S.PHON: ʔæhœʔ ʔima pajhœʔ raj katis~θraloman ʔam aliβih ka taʔœlœh.
S.TRANSL: 狗卡在瓶子裡,要把頭抽回來.
The dog stuck its head inside the bottle, and he wanted to take his head out.

S.FORM: paalibih ila ka bat malben ila 'aehoe' mokakaso.
S.PHON: paaliβih ila ka βat malβən ila ʔæhœʔ mokakas~θo.
S.FORM: paalibih ila ka bat malben ila 'aehoe' mokakaso.
S.PHON: paaliβih ila ka βat malβən ila ʔæhœʔ mokakas~θo.
S.TRANSL: 狗要把頭抽回來,卻跌倒了.狗往後退.
The dog wanted to take its head out of the container but fell down. It stepped back.

S.PHON: a paonhææʔ katis~θraloman.
a paonhææʔ katis~θraloman.
S.TRANSL: 水瓶掉了.

TRANSL.notes: The (dog and the) container fell down.

S.TRANSL: The container fell down.

S.PHON: mæʔijæh kis~θraj hinœhas~θ ʔœʔœ ila.
mæʔijæh kis~θraj hinœhas~θ ʔœʔœ ila.
S.TRANSL: 人從窗口呼喊.
The man called out from the window.

S.FORM: 'ahoe' 'am alibih ila ka ta'oeloeh katisraloman ka wareng ma' paiho.
S.PHON: ʔahœʔ ʔam aliβih ila ka taʔœlœh katis~θraloman ka warəŋ maʔ paiho.
S.FORM: 'ahoe' 'am alibih ila ka ta'oeloeh katisraloman ka wareng ma' paiho.
S.PHON: ʔahœʔ ʔam aliβih ila ka taʔœlœh katis~θraloman ka warəŋ maʔ paiho.
S.TRANSL: 狗要把頭抽回來,頭伸進去瓶頸裡.
The dog wanted to take out its head from the bottle.

S.FORM: mae'iyaeh kisohinoehas 'ima kita' e 'aehoe' a sika katisraloman sipanrakay ila.
S.PHON: mæʔijæh kis~θohinœhas~θ ʔima kitaʔ ə ʔæhœʔ a s~θika katis~θraloman s~θipanrakaj ila.
S.FORM: mae'iyaeh kisohinoehas 'ima kita' e 'aehoe' a sika katisraloman sipanrakay ila.
S.PHON: mæʔijæh kis~θohinœhas~θ ʔima kitaʔ ə ʔæhœʔ a s~θika katis~θraloman s~θipanrakaj ila.
S.TRANSL: 人在窗戶邊看到狗打破了瓶子.
The boy at the window saw the dog broke the container.

S.PHON: mariʔin noka mæʔijæh æwpœʔœn ila ʔæhœʔ.
mariʔin noka mæʔijæh æwpœʔœn ila ʔæhœʔ.
S.TRANSL: 人抱著狗.
The person took and carried the dog."

S.PHON: mæʔijæh ʔœʔœ ila.
mæʔijæh ʔœʔœ ila.
S.TRANSL: 人一直呼喊.
He continued to call out.

S.PHON: ʔæhœʔ maʔ toβoŋ ila.
ʔæhœʔ maʔ toβoŋ ila.
S.TRANSL: 狗也吠叫.
The dog barked too.

S.PHON: ə hajz~ðaʔ ila ka βojaʔ.
ə hajz~ðaʔ ila ka βojaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 有蜂窩.
There were beehive.

S.PHON: kæhœj ka roroʔ.
kæhœj ka roroʔ.
S.TRANSL: 樹洞.
There were holes on the tree."

S.FORM: boya' lak boya' babaw 'aehoe' kita' tobong.
S.PHON: βojaʔ lak βojaʔ βaβaw ʔæhœʔ kitaʔ toβoŋ.
S.FORM: boya' lak boya' babaw 'aehoe' kita' tobong.
S.PHON: βojaʔ lak βojaʔ βaβaw ʔæhœʔ kitaʔ toβoŋ.
S.TRANSL: 一個蜂窩在上面,狗看到就叫.
There was a beehive above. The dog saw and barked at it.

S.PHON: βojaʔ kas~θʔœhaz~ð.
βojaʔ kas~θʔœhaz~ð.
S.TRANSL: 蜂飛出來.
The bees flew out.

S.PHON: mæʔijæh ka korkoriŋ mas~θrokoʔ ʔœʔœ ka ʔæwhæs~θ.
mæʔijæh ka korkoriŋ mas~θrokoʔ ʔœʔœ ka ʔæwhæs~θ.
S.TRANSL: 小孩彎下去,把老鼠叫出來.
The child bent down and called out to the mouse.

S.PHON: ʔæhœʔ ʔakamaʔ raj kæhœj piŋiʔ.
ʔæhœʔ ʔakamaʔ raj kæhœj piŋiʔ.
S.TRANSL: 狗爬到樹邊.
The dog crawled to the side of the tree.

S.FORM: te'te' ka boya' boya' kas'oehaz ila.
S.PHON: təʔtəʔ ka βojaʔ βojaʔ kas~θʔœhaz~ð ila.
S.FORM: te'te' ka boya' boya' kas'oehaz ila.
S.PHON: təʔtəʔ ka βojaʔ βojaʔ kas~θʔœhaz~ð ila.
S.TRANSL: 敲蜂窩.蜂飛出來了.
And knocked on the tree where the beehive was. The bees flew out.

S.PHON: mæʔijæh korkoriŋ tikot ila kitaʔ.
mæʔijæh korkoriŋ tikot ila kitaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 小孩嚇到了看著.
The boy got afraid and looked at it.

S.PHON: ʔæwhaj kas~θ ʔæwhæ ʔæwhæs~θ kas~θʔœhaz~ð ila.
ʔæwhaj kas~θ ʔæwhæ ʔæwhæs~θ kas~θʔœhaz~ð ila.
S.TRANSL: 老鼠跑出來.
The mouse got out too.

S.PHON: βojaʔ noka ʔæhœʔ təʔtəən s~θahæʔ ila.
βojaʔ noka ʔæhœʔ təʔtəən s~θahæʔ ila.
S.TRANSL: 狗把蜂窩敲掉落了.
The dog knocked the beehive and it fell down.

S.PHON: kas~θʔœhaz~ð ila ka kaʔinaʔan.
kas~θʔœhaz~ð ila ka kaʔinaʔan.
S.TRANSL: 蜂飛出來.
The bees flew out.

S.PHON: ʔæwhæs~θ maʔ kas~θʔœhaz~ð ila.
ʔæwhæs~θ maʔ kas~θʔœhaz~ð ila.
S.TRANSL: 老鼠也出來了.
The mouse also got out.

S.FORM: mae'iyaeh korkoring tikot 'am hosail ila ray roro' ka kaehoey.
S.PHON: mæʔijæh korkoriŋ tikot ʔam hos~θail ila raj roroʔ ka kæhœj.
S.FORM: mae'iyaeh korkoring tikot 'am hosail ila ray roro' ka kaehoey.
S.PHON: mæʔijæh korkoriŋ tikot ʔam hos~θail ila raj roroʔ ka kæhœj.
S.TRANSL: 小孩嚇到了躲在樹洞裡.
The child got afraid and hid inside a treehole.

S.FORM: e korkoring 'am hosail ila ray roro' ray roro' hayza' ka 'oewi'.
S.PHON: ə korkoriŋ ʔam hos~θail ila raj roroʔ raj roroʔ hajz~ðaʔ ka ʔœwiʔ.
S.FORM: e korkoring 'am hosail ila ray roro' ray roro' hayza' ka 'oewi'.
S.PHON: ə korkoriŋ ʔam hos~θail ila raj roroʔ raj roroʔ hajz~ðaʔ ka ʔœwiʔ.
S.TRANSL: 小孩躲在洞裡,洞裡有貓頭鷹.
The child hid inside a tree hole where there was an owl.

S.FORM: kas'oehaz homses mae'iyaeh sahae' ila ray rai'.
S.PHON: kas~θʔœhaz~ð homs~θəs~θ mæʔijæh s~θahæʔ ila raj raiʔ.
S.FORM: kas'oehaz homses mae'iyaeh sahae' ila ray rai'.
S.PHON: kas~θʔœhaz~ð homs~θəs~θ mæʔijæh s~θahæʔ ila raj raiʔ.
S.TRANSL: 貓頭鷹飛出來,小孩嚇到掉在地上.
The owl flew out. The boy got surprised and fell down to the ground.

S.PHON: βojaʔ s~θowaw ila ka ʔæhœʔ.
βojaʔ s~θowaw ila ka ʔæhœʔ.
S.TRANSL: 蜂追狗.
The bees chased the dog.

S.FORM: a 'oewi' hayap ila mae'iyaeh homses tasi ho bilis ka ta'oeloeh.
S.PHON: a ʔœwiʔ hajap ila mæʔijæh homs~θəs~θ tas~θi ho βilis~θ ka taʔœlœh.
S.FORM: a 'oewi' hayap ila mae'iyaeh homses tasi ho bilis ka ta'oeloeh.
S.PHON: a ʔœwiʔ hajap ila mæʔijæh homs~θəs~θ tas~θi ho βilis~θ ka taʔœlœh.
S.TRANSL: 貓頭鷹一飛小孩嚇到了,抓著頭.
The owl flew up and the boy got afraid, and held his head.

S.FORM: mae'iyaeh kaSna'itol ray bab ray ka bato' babaw 'oe'oe ila ka 'oe'oe.
S.PHON: mæʔijæh kaʃnaʔitol raj βaβ raj ka βatoʔ βaβaw ʔœʔœ ila ka ʔœʔœ.
S.FORM: mae'iyaeh kaSna'itol ray bab ray ka bato' babaw 'oe'oe ila ka 'oe'oe.
S.PHON: mæʔijæh kaʃnaʔitol raj βaβ raj ka βatoʔ βaβaw ʔœʔœ ila ka ʔœʔœ.
S.TRANSL: 小孩爬上石頭,叫啊叫.
The child went on top of the rock and called out.

S.PHON: ʔæhœʔ raj βatoʔ raj raiʔ mamas~θrokoʔ.
ʔæhœʔ raj βatoʔ raj raiʔ mamas~θrokoʔ.
S.TRANSL: 狗在石頭上,小孩在地上彎著腰.
The dog lay down on the rock, while the boy bent down on the ground.

S.PHON: βaβaw hajz~ðaʔ ka ʔœwiʔ ʔima kitaʔ.
βaβaw hajz~ðaʔ ka ʔœwiʔ ʔima kitaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 上面有貓頭鷹看著.
There was an owl over them and watching.

S.FORM: mae'iyaeh papama' ila ray wae'ae' ma' ray oeS'oeSoe'an.
S.PHON: mæʔijæh papamaʔ ila raj wæʔæʔ maʔ raj œʃʔœʃœʔan.
S.FORM: mae'iyaeh papama' ila ray wae'ae' ma' ray oeS'oeSoe'an.
S.PHON: mæʔijæh papamaʔ ila raj wæʔæʔ maʔ raj œʃʔœʃœʔan.
S.TRANSL: 小孩騎著鹿也往草地去.
The child rode on the deer, which went toward the grassy land.

S.FORM: e wae'ae' 'ae'aeaew ila ray kokool babaw.
S.PHON: ə wæʔæʔ ʔæʔææw ila raj kokool βaβaw.
S.FORM: e wae'ae' 'ae'aeaew ila ray kokool babaw.
S.PHON: ə wæʔæʔ ʔæʔææw ila raj kokool βaβaw.
S.TRANSL: 鹿跑到山的上面.
The deer ran to the top of the mountain.

S.PHON: ʔæhœʔ ʔæʔææw ʔœʔœ ka wæʔæʔ kitaʔ ka ʔataʃ mintaniʔ.
ʔæhœʔ ʔæʔææw ʔœʔœ ka wæʔæʔ kitaʔ ka ʔataʃ mintaniʔ.
S.TRANSL: 狗一邊跑一邊叫鹿,看到懸崖停下來.
The dog ran and called the deer, which stopped upon seeing the cliff.

S.FORM: 'aehoe' ki mae'iyaeh sahae' ila ila hao ray 'ataS.
S.PHON: ʔæhœʔ ki mæʔijæh s~θahæʔ ila ila hao raj ʔataʃ.
S.FORM: 'aehoe' ki mae'iyaeh sahae' ila ila hao ray 'ataS.
S.PHON: ʔæhœʔ ki mæʔijæh s~θahæʔ ila ila hao raj ʔataʃ.
S.TRANSL: 狗和人從懸崖掉下去.
The boy and the dog fell off the cliff.

S.FORM: hini kabih hayza' ka kaehkaehoeyan ki 'oemah.
S.PHON: hini kaβih hajz~ðaʔ ka kæhkæhœjan ki ʔœmah.
S.FORM: hini kabih hayza' ka kaehkaehoeyan ki 'oemah.
S.PHON: hini kaβih hajz~ðaʔ ka kæhkæhœjan ki ʔœmah.
S.TRANSL: 這邊有森林和土地.
There were a forest and a piece of land on the side.

S.FORM: wae'ae' 'ima sakosiza ka mae'iyaeh 'ima sahae' ray waSal a k ki 'aehoe' m 'aehoe' ma' sahae' 'oyae' mari'(in) noka mae'iyaeh.
S.PHON: wæʔæʔ ʔima s~θakos~θiz~ða ka mæʔijæh ʔima s~θahæʔ raj waʃal a k ki ʔæhœʔ m ʔæhœʔ maʔ s~θahæʔ ʔojæʔ mariʔ(in) noka mæʔijæh.
S.FORM: wae'ae' 'ima sakosiza ka mae'iyaeh 'ima sahae' ray waSal a k ki 'aehoe' m 'aehoe' ma' sahae' 'oyae' mari'(in) noka mae'iyaeh.
S.PHON: wæʔæʔ ʔima s~θakos~θiz~ða ka mæʔijæh ʔima s~θahæʔ raj waʃal a k ki ʔæhœʔ m ʔæhœʔ maʔ s~θahæʔ ʔojæʔ mariʔ(in) noka mæʔijæh.
S.TRANSL: 鹿看著人掉到水裡下,狗也一起掉下去,被人帶著.
The deer saw the boy fall down in the water. The dog also fell down, carried by the boy."

S.FORM: aSkanen ray a totoko'on ray abaeae' babaw.
S.PHON: aʃkanən raj a totokoʔon raj aβææʔ βaβaw.
S.FORM: aSkanen ray a totoko'on ray abaeae' babaw.
S.PHON: aʃkanən raj a totokoʔon raj aβææʔ βaβaw.
S.TRANSL: 狗被放在,蹲坐在肩膀上.

TRANSL.notes: (The dog was) put on the shoulder."

S.TRANSL: put on the shoulder."

S.PHON: las~θia kas~θʔœhaz~ð raj ralom.
las~θia kas~θʔœhaz~ð raj ralom.
S.TRANSL: 他們從水裡出來.
They got out of the water.

S.PHON: ʔæhœʔ lalaŋoj ila.
ʔæhœʔ lalaŋoj ila.
S.TRANSL: 狗游泳.
The dog swam.

S.FORM: ki mae'iyaeh a papama' ila ray a tabai a eN papama' ila ray tabai babaw.
S.PHON: ki mæʔijæh a papamaʔ ila raj a taβai a ən papamaʔ ila raj taβai βaβaw.
S.FORM: ki mae'iyaeh a papama' ila ray a tabai a eN papama' ila ray tabai babaw.
S.PHON: ki mæʔijæh a papamaʔ ila raj a taβai a ən papamaʔ ila raj taβai βaβaw.
S.TRANSL: 小孩騎在枯木上面.
The boy rode on top of a dead wood.

S.FORM: papama' ila potngor ray hini' kabih.
S.PHON: papamaʔ ila potŋor raj hiniʔ kaβih.
S.FORM: papama' ila potngor ray hini' kabih.
S.PHON: papamaʔ ila potŋor raj hiniʔ kaβih.
S.TRANSL: 騎著到這邊.
He rode and got to the other side.

S.PHON: kitaʔ ila ka takəm roʃaʔ.
kitaʔ ila ka takəm roʃaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 看到兩隻青蛙.
He saw two frogs.

S.FORM: 'ahoe' kisbabaw ki ma'iaeh kita' ka takem 'ima 'akoy.
S.PHON: ʔahœʔ kis~θβaβaw ki maʔiæh kitaʔ ka takəm ʔima ʔakoj.
S.FORM: 'ahoe' kisbabaw ki ma'iaeh kita' ka takem 'ima 'akoy.
S.PHON: ʔahœʔ kis~θβaβaw ki maʔiæh kitaʔ ka takəm ʔima ʔakoj.
S.TRANSL: 狗和人在上面看到青蛙很多.
The boy and the dog on top of him saw many frogs."

S.FORM: e ray ralom hao ray ralom ki mae'iyaeh rakep ka takem 'aeh 'aehae'.
S.PHON: ə raj ralom hao raj ralom ki mæʔijæh rakəp ka takəm ʔæh ʔæhæʔ.
S.FORM: e ray ralom hao ray ralom ki mae'iyaeh rakep ka takem 'aeh 'aehae'.
S.PHON: ə raj ralom hao raj ralom ki mæʔijæh rakəp ka takəm ʔæh ʔæhæʔ.
S.TRANSL: 他們在水那裡抓了一隻青蛙.
They caught one frog from the water.

S.FORM: sakosiza kabih ray atabai babaw takem o ray ray ray tabai babaw 'akoy.
S.PHON: s~θakos~θiz~ða kaβih raj ataβai βaβaw takəm o raj raj raj taβai βaβaw ʔakoj.
S.FORM: sakosiza kabih ray atabai babaw takem o ray ray ray tabai babaw 'akoy.
S.PHON: s~θakos~θiz~ða kaβih raj ataβai βaβaw takəm o raj raj raj taβai βaβaw ʔakoj.
S.TRANSL: 從上面看到枯木邊很多青蛙.
They looked from atop at the side of the piece of wood and saw many frogs.
